errataText.en:
Change to:

‘At the start of your Movement phase, select one of the following:

■ **Defensive Footing**: Select one **objective** you control. Until the start of your next Movement phase, that objective is your **Vowed** **objective**.
■ **Aggressive Push**: Select one or more **objective** you do not control. Until the start of your next Movement phase, each of those **objectives** is one of your **Vowed objectives**. If a rule refers to a unit or model being within range of your **Vowed objective**, that rule takes effect if that unit or model is within range of one or more of your **Vowed objectives**. Each time a **DEATHWING INFANTRY** unit from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of one or more of your **Vowed objectives**, add 1 to the Wound roll.’

If you targeted an **ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK** unit from your army with this Stratagem, then until the end of the phase, while a friendly **ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY** unit is unit is within 3" of your unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.'

question.en: When an **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from my army is destroyed, if that unit was within 12" of a friendly Imagifier when it was destroyed, does that Imagifier’s Litany of Deeds ability allow me to re‑roll the result of the Miracle dice I gain as a result of the Acts of Faith army rule?

If a <k>Character</k> with the Saintly Example Enhancement is destroyed while within 12" of a friendly Imagifier, can I use that Imagifier’s Litany of Deeds ability to re‑roll the results of the additional D3 Miracle dice I gain from that Enhancement, before adding them to my Miracle Dice pool?

If a CHARACTER with the Verse of Holy Piety Enhancement uses that Enhancement to activate a Vow of Atonement at the start of a battle round, but that CHARACTER is destroyed before the end of that battle round (e.g. by an attack with the [PRECISION] ability), is that Vow of Atonement still active for the remaining models in that unit until the start of the next battle round?
Can a Miracle dice be used as part of a re‑roll?
If I re‑roll a roll in which I substituted a dice with a Miracle dice, do I get to use the Miracle dice in that re‑roll (e.g. when re‑rolling a Charge roll)?

answer.en: No, that Miracle dice is lost. Note that your unit has still performed an Act of Faith.

question.en: Can the Triumph of Saint Katherine’s Simulacrum of the Ebon Chalice Relics of the Matriarchs ability be used to substitute two dice in a single roll?
How do Miracle Dice work during the attack sequence?

answer.en: During the attack sequence, an Adepta Sororitas player's attacking unit can use an Act of Faith when making hit rolls (where they can substitute a dice from any given group of attacks before making the roll), wound rolls (where they can substitute a dice from any given group of hits before making the roll) or damage rolls (when they can substitute a dice for a single damage roll before making the roll). An Adepta Sororitas player's target unit can use an Act of Faith when making save rolls (where they can substitute a dice for any given group of wounding attacks before making the roll).

answer.en: The Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit is first changed to 3+ by the Stratagem, then improved by 1 by the Protector Imperative, for a final result of 2+ (assuming no other modifiers apply).

'Before the battle, at the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one **YNNARI KABALITE WARRIORS** or **YNNARI WYCHES** unit from your army that has not already been split. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this **TRANSPORT**; the other can start the battle embarked within another **TRANSPORT**, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.'

question.en: After using the Torc of Morai-Heg Enhancement, must my opponent continue to use the selected Stratagem at the increased cost if they have necessary CP available?
After using the Torc of Morai-Heg Enhancement, if my opponent does not have the necessary CP available for the selected Stratagem, what happens?

answer.en: No CP are spent and that Stratagem’s effects are not resolved (but that Stratagem still counts as having been used this phase).

question.en: If a unit becomes affected by the same Order multiple times, do those Orders affect that unit multiple times?
Can the Reinforcements! Stratagem be used on a unit that is Battle-shocked?
If a unit contains two models equipped with a vox-caster, can I attempt to generate 1CP twice when the bearer’s unit is targeted with a Stratagem?
Can I attempt to generate 1CP from a unit containing a vox-caster, when targeting that unit with the Reinforcements! Stratagem?
When using the Creeping Barrage ability, how do you resolve the maximum number of units that can be shaken?

answer.en: You roll one D6 for each enemy unit that is more than 12” from every model from your army that is on the battlefield, in an order of your choosing, one at a time. Once the maximum number of enemy units for the battle size have been shaken, stop rolling for any additional units.

question.en: When an Ogryn Bodyguard joins a Militarum Tempestus Command Squad, can the unit set up using the Deep Strike ability?

answer.en: No, as the Ogryn Bodyguard model does not have the Deep Strike ability.

question.en: If I use the Cults of the Dark Gods rule to add Plague Marines to my Chaos Space Marines army, does the Plague Marines’ Infused with the Blessings of Nurgle ability have any effect?
When using the Soul Link Enhancement, can I select a **CHARACTER** model from my army that is not on the battlefield?
Can I select a unit to shoot when there are no eligible targets so that unit can make a Dark Pact?
When replacing the datasheet abilities of the bearer of the Soul Link Enhancement with those of the selected **CHARACTER** model, does this include Core and Faction abilities?
If I am using the Veterans of the Long War Detachment, can I select a unit embarked within a **TRANSPORT** to be my focus of hatred?
Can I use the Opportunistic Raiders Stratagem to Fall Back with a unit of Warp Talons, then use that unit’s Warp Strike ability to place it into Strategic Reserves?

answer.en: If that Warp Talons unit destroyed one or more units this phase, yes otherwise, no.

question.en: Can my **CHARACTER** with the Soul Link Enhancement use that Enhancement while it is in Reserves/Strategic Reserves?
For the Opportunistic Raiders Stratagem, is a unit that did not fight this phase an eligible target for that Stratagem, provided it was eligible to fight at one point during the phase?
When a model ‘fights on death’, can that model’s unit make a Dark Pact?

answer.en: No, as the unit is not selected to fight.

question.en: If I am using the Deceptors Detachment, when I use the Scrambled Coordinates Stratagem, can my opponent sequence one or more of their ‘end of your Movement phase’ abilities (e.g. Da Jump) to happen after that Stratagem’s effect ends?

When using the Soul Link Enhancement, can the bearer use a datasheet ability it gains as a result even if that ability has already been used by another **CHARACTER** model as many times as its restrictions allow (e.g. ‘once per battle’, ‘once per phase’)?
When replacing the datasheet abilities of the bearer of the Soul Link Enhancement with those of the selected **CHARACTER** model, does this include which units the bearer can be attached to?

If I am using the Veterans of the Long War Detachment and I select an Attached unit to be my focus of hatred, if that unit splits for any reason, are each of the resulting units my focus of hatred until the start of my next Command phase?
Does Fabius Bile’s Enhanced Warriors ability apply if Fabius starts the battle as part of an Attached unit inside a transport?
When is the model destroyed by the Traitor Enforcer’s Brutal Example ability removed?

answer.en: Before resolving the Fire Overwatch Stratagem with that unit.

question.en: When I replace the datasheet abilities of the bearer of the Soul Link Enhancement, do persisting effects that were gained from the replaced abilities continue to apply to the bearer of the Soul Link Enhancement?
When I select a unit as the target of the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, can that unit make a Dark Pact?

answer.en: Yes, as the unit is selected to shoot.

question.en: For the Warp Talons’ Warp Strike ability, is a unit that did not fight this phase eligible to use that ability, provided it was eligible to fight at one point during the phase?

errataHeader.en: Army Rule Section

errataText.en:
Add the following:

‘**Corsairs and Travelling Players**

If your Army Faction is **DRUKHARI**, you can include **HARLEQUINS** and **ANHRATHE** units in your army, even though they do not have the **DRUKHARI** Faction keyword. The combined points value of **HARLEQUINS** and/or **ANHRATHE** units you can include in your army depends on the battle size, as follows:

■ **Incursion**: Up to 250 pts
■ **Strike Force**: Up to 500 pts
■ **Onslaught**: Up to 750 pts

No **HARLEQUINS** or **ANHRATHE** models included in your army in this way can be your **WARLORD**, and they cannot be given Enhancements.’

‘This model has a transport capacity of 6 **DRUKHARI INFANTRY** models (excluding **JUMP PACK** models).

Before the battle, at the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one **KABALITE WARRIORS**, **HAND OF THE ARCHON** or **WYCHES** unit from your army that has not already been split. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this model; the other can start the battle embarked within another **TRANSPORT**, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.’

question.en: While using the Carnival of Excess Detachment, for the purposes of the Daemonic Empowerment rule, if my unit already has a weapon with [SUSTAINED HITS] (e.g. Shalaxi Helbane’s Pavane of Slaanesh, which has [SUSTAINED HITS 3]), does an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ for such a weapon score a Critical Hit?
While using the Coterie of the Conceited Detachment, if my WARLORD is not on the battlefield, can I use the Unbound Arrogance Stratagem?

answer.en: Yes, your pledge to Slaanesh would increase from 0 to 1.

errataHeader.en: Cult Ambush

errataText.en:
Change to:

‘If your Army Faction is **GENESTEALER CULTS**, you start the battle with a number of Resurgence points, depending on the battle size, as shown below.

■ **Incursion**: 6 Resurgence points
■ **Strike Force**: 10 Resurgence points
■ **Onslaught**: 14 Resurgence points

Each time a unit from your army is destroyed, if every model (excluding **CHARACTER** models)  in that unit has this ability, you can spend the relevant number of Resurgence points shown below based on that unit’s Starting Strength (not including attached **CHARACTER** models).

**Aberrants**
5 models 4 Resurgence points
10 models 8 Resurgence points

**Acolyte Hybrids with Autopistols, Acolyte Hybrids with Hand Flamers, Hybrid Metamorphs**
5 models 2 Resurgence points
10 models 4 Resurgence points

**Atalan Jackals**
5 models 2 Resurgence points
10 models 6 Resurgence points

**Neophyte Hybrids**
10 models 3 Resurgence points
20 models 6 Resurgence points

**Purestrain Genestealers**
5 models 2 Resurgence points
10 models 6 Resurgence points

If you do:
■ Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit (excluding **CHARACTER** models), in Cult Ambush, at its Starting Strength, with all of its wounds remaining and any **[ONE SHOT]** weapons those models are equipped with considered as not having been shot.
■ Place one Cult Ambush marker (see below) anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, no marker is placed).

**UNITS IN CULT AMBUSH**
Cult Ambush is a type of Strategic Reserves. Units in Cult Ambush cannot be targeted with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem, but can be set up on the battlefield using a Cult Ambush marker as described below, or by following the rules for Strategic Reserves in a subsequent turn. Units in Cult Ambush are not automically destroyed at the end of the third battle round.

**CULT AMBUSH MARKERS**
Use a circular 32mm diameter marker for Cult Ambush markers. If an enemy model (excluding **AIRCRAFT**) ends any kind of move within 8" of a Cult Ambush marker you placed, that Cult Ambush marker is removed from the battlefield. At the end of your opponent’s next Movement phase, for each of your Cult Ambush markers still on the battlefield, you can select one unit from your army that is in Cult Ambush to make an **ingress move**. For that **ingress move**, set that unit up with at least one model in that unit in base contact with that Cult Ambush marker and all other models placed wholly within 3" of that Cult Ambush marker (that Cult Ambush marker is then removed from the battlefield). Units in Cult Ambush can make an **ingress move** in the first battle round using this rule.'

question.en: When setting up a unit using the Cult Ambush army rule, if my opponent has an ability that places restrictions on where my Reserves units can be set up (e.g. a Space Marine Infiltrator Squad’s Omni-scramblers ability), do I have to meet those restrictions when setting up my unit (e.g. for Omni-scramblers, not within 12” of that Infiltrator Squad)?
If I include Kasrkin units in my army using the rules for Brood Brothers, can I use their Warrior Elite ability to select an Order for them in my Command phase?
When I set up a unit using the Cult Ambush army rule without using a Cult Ambush marker, can I target that unit with the Tunnel Crawlers Stratagem?
If one of my **CHARACTER** models is destroyed, do I need to have another **GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER** model on the battlefield or in Reserves to use the Vengeance for the Martyr! Stratagem?
Do I have to remove ‘unused’ Cult Ambush markers from the battlefield at the end of my opponent’s next Movement phase?
If I have no units in Cult Ambush, do I have to remove any remaining Cult Ambush markers from the battlefield?

question.en: Can a unit be affected by a Resurrection Orb (e.g. from a Catacomb Command Barge and an Overlord) more than once per turn?
Can a Cryptothrall that has used its Systematic Vigour ability to ‘fight on death’ later fight again if returned to its unit before that unit is selected to fight?
When using the Protocol of the Undying Legions Stratagem, are any other rules that are applicable to Reanimation Protocols applied (e.g. Necron Warriors’ Their Number is Legion ability)?
If I am using the Canoptek Court Detachment, if there are no objective markers within No Man’s Land or within my opponent’s deployment zone, can those areas be within my army’s Power Matrix?
Can I use the Cosmic Precision Stratagem to set up a unit anywhere on the battlefield instead of only wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge, even if it doesn’t have the Deep Strike ability?

When being set up using the Cosmic Precision Stratagem, does a model that is large (e.g. a Tesseract Vault) have to follow the rules for large models in the Setting Up Large Models Appendix (03.02.02)?

When using the Protocol of the Conquering Tyrant Stratagem or Lokhust Destroyers’ Hard-wired for Destruction ability, to be eligible to re-roll the Hit roll, does the unit also need to be eligible to re-roll a Hit roll of 1?

answer.en: Yes (see ‘Rules with Multiple Conditions and Effects’ in the Rules Commentary).

question.en: When I set up a unit using the Monolith’s Eternity Gate ability, do I have to set that unit up wholly within 6" of one battlefield edge?
When I set up a unit using the Monolith’s Eternity Gate ability, and  that unit is not wholly within 6" of one battlefield edge, is that unit eligible to shoot in my Shooting phase?

Does the Canoptek Court Autodivinator Enhancement trigger when army rule effects such as Code Chivalric (Imperial Knights) award a player CP, or when an opponent discards a Secondary Mission card for 1CP?

answer.en: No in both cases. It only triggers when your opponent gains CP as the result of an ability (not any other kind of rule).

question.en: If a unit is removed from the battlefield using the Hypercrypt Legion Hyperphasing Detachment rule and it has the Deep Strike ability, can that unit arrive from Reserves in the first battle round?
If I target a Canoptek Wraiths unit with the Canoptek Court Reactive Subroutines Stratagem, can this trigger that unit’s Wraith Form ability?

Do rules that activate Reanimation Protocols (e.g. the Protocol of the Undying Legions Stratagem) only apply to a Bodyguard unit whose attached Leader unit is on the battlefield if one or more models from that Bodyguard unit are also still on the battlefield?

question.en: If I attach a Big Mek to a Mek Gunz unit, does the unit now suffer 1 mortal wound for each failed hazard roll, because each model in the unit is now not a **MONSTER/VEHICLE** model?

If a unit has an ability that checks if the Waaagh! is active for your army in order for that ability to take effect (e.g. the Meganobz’ Krumpin’ Time ability), does that ability take effect if another rule makes the Waaagh! active for that unit (e.g. the Bully Boyz Detachment rule)?

If a model has an ability that triggers when you call a Waaagh! and that model is embarked within a **TRANSPORT** when this happens (e.g. a Warboss’ Da Biggest and da Best ability), does that ability take effect?
When using the Conniving Runts Stratagem, to be able to make the Normal move as part of the Stratagem, do I need to roll a 4+ and have inflicted any mortal wounds?
In the Effect section of the Go Get ’Em! Stratagem there is an additional effect if my unit contains 10 or more models. When do I check if my unit has 10 or more models?

answer.en: This is checked after the attacking unit has shot.

question.en: Can a unit equipped with multiple Bomb Squigs use its Bomb Squig ability more than once each phase?

errataHeader.en: Space Marine Chapters, Army Rules

errataText.en:
Add the following bullet points:

‘• If your army includes one or more **BLACK TEMPLARS** units, it cannot include any **ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER** models, and cannot include any of the following models that do not have the **BLACK TEMPLARS** keyword: **GLADIATOR LANCER**; **GLADIATOR REAPER**; **GLADIATOR VALIANT**; **IMPULSOR**; **REPULSOR**; **REPULSOR EXECUTIONER**.
• If your army includes one or more **SPACE WOLVES** units, it cannot include any of the following units: **APOTHECARY**; **DEVASTATOR SQUAD**; **TACTICAL SQUAD**.’

Add new sub-header and bullet points:

‘**DEATHWATCH**

■ Your army can include **ADEPTUS ASTARTES DEATHWATCH** units, but it cannot include any **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units drawn from any other Chapter.
■ With the exception of **Kill Team Cassius** (see Legends: Agents of the Imperium), your army cannot include any **AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM DEATHWATCH** units.
■ Your army cannot include any of the following units: **ASSAULT SQUAD**; **ASSAULT SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS**; **ATTACK BIKE SQUAD**; **DEVASTATOR SQUAD**; **LAND SPEEDER STORM**; **RELIC TERMINATOR SQUAD**; **SCOUT BIKE SQUAD**; **SCOUT SQUAD**; **SCOUT SNIPER SQUAD**; **TACTICAL SQUAD**; **TERMINATOR ASSAULT SQUAD**; **TERMINATOR SQUAD**.

errataHeader.en: Oath of Moment, Army Rules

errataText.en:
Change to:

‘If your Army Faction is **ADEPTUS ASTARTES**, at the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Oath of Moment target. Each time a model with this ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target:

■ You can re-roll the Hit roll.
■ If you are using a *Codex: Space Marines* Detachment and your army does not include one or more units with the **BLOOD ANGELS**, **DARK ANGELS**, **DEATHWATCH** or **SPACE WOLVES** keywords, or one or more units from those factions’ Munitorum Field Manual sections, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.’

question.en: Which Detachments are considered to be *Codex: Space Marines* Detachments?

answer.en: Every Detachment printed in *Codex: Space Marines* and every Detachment included in the Space Marines Faction Pack.

question.en: While using the Gladius Task Force Detachment, does a Combat Doctrine need to be active for my army in order to use the Adaptive Strategy Stratagem?
If a Hellblaster is destroyed by anything other than an attack or Hazardous test, can that model use its For the Chapter! ability?
Can I use a Captain’s Rites of Battle ability to target that Captain’s unit if it is in Reserves or Strategic Reserves?
Does an objective marker that has been Sabotaged by my army using the A Deadly Prize Stratagem remain Sabotaged if my opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn?

answer.en: Yes. However, while your opponent controls that objective marker, its ability to inflict mortal wounds is not active.

question.en: While an Attached unit is embarked within a **TRANSPORT**, do weapons that **TRANSPORT** shoots with using the Firing Deck ability benefit from any abilities the attached Leader has (e.g. a Lieutenant’s Tactical Precision ability, which grants weapons in its unit the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability)?

answer.en: No. Firing Deck enables a **TRANSPORT** to be equipped with a number of weapons equipped by its passengers (Core Rules), but the **TRANSPORT** itself is not part of that Attached unit.

question.en: Can a unit embarked within a **TRANSPORT** be selected as the Oath of Moment target?
Can a unit in Reserves be selected as the Oath of Moment target?
Can a unit in Reserves use an Enhancement (following all restrictions outlined by that Enhancement)?
If I have two or more Impulsors within 6" of a unit I target with a Stratagem, do each of their Orbital Comms Array wargear abilities trigger?

answer.en: No, they are Aura abilities and so do not stack.

question.en: If I use a Stratagem on a unit within 6" of an Impulsor with an Orbital Comms Array, but I do not roll high enough to gain 1CP as a result of that wargear, if that same unit is within 6" of a different Impulsor that also has an Orbital Comms Array, can I attempt to roll another D6 to try to gain 1CP?
Do multiple instances of the Astartes Banner ability stack?

If I select one **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit as the target of all of a Stormspeeder Thunderstrike’s ranged weapons, and the first weapon that model makes attacks with scores one or more hits, do I add 1 to the Wound rolls made for attacks with its remaining weapons?

answer.en: No. Only after you have resolved the attacks with all weapons it is shooting with this phase, has that model shot (see ‘Shot’ in the Rules Appendix, 04.03.04).

question.en: When making attacks with a unit from my army, I split my attacks between the first Oath of Moment target selected as part of my army rule and the second Oath of Moment target selected using Roboute Guilliman’s Master of Battle Author of the Codex ability. If I destroy the first Oath of Moment target before resolving my attacks against the second Oath of Moment target, will those attacks against the second Oath of Moment target benefit from the re-rolls to hit?

answer.en: No. Only after all of the attacks from that unit have been resolved will the second Oath of Moment selection become active.

errataHeader.en: Army Rules, For the Greater Good

errataText.en:
Change to:

'If your Army Faction is **T'AU EMPIRE**, at the start of your Shooting phase you can select units from your army with this ability to become Observer units.

During your Shooting phase, for each Observer unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is eligible to shoot (excluding FORTIFICATION and Battle-shocked units) select one enemy unit that is visible to be marked as their Spotted unit until the end of the phase. Each enemy unit can only be marked as a Spotted unit once per phase.

Units from your army with the For the Greater Good ability (excluding Observer units) are Guided units while targeting one or more Spotted units.

Until the end of the phase, each time a model from your army in a Guided unit makes an attack that targets a Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and, if the Spotted unit was marked by an Observer unit that has the Markerlight keyword, that attack has the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.’

errataText.en:
Change first paragraph to:

‘If your Army Faction is **THOUSAND SONS**, at the start of your Shooting phase, one or more models from your army with this ability can attempt Rituals from those listed on the right. To do so, select one model from your army with this ability that has not yet attempted a Ritual this turn and select one Ritual no model from your army has attempted to manifest this turn, then take a Psychic test for that model by following the sequence below.’

**Destiny’s Ruin (Psychic)**
Change to:

‘Select one enemy unit within 24” of and visible to the manifesting model. Until the end of the phase, each time a **THOUSAND SONS** or **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 10+, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.’

**Temporal Surge (Psychic)**
Change to:

‘Select one friendly **THOUSAND SONS** or **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** unit that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is within 24” of and visible to the manifesting model. That unit can make a Normal move of up to D6”. If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 10+, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6” instead. In either case, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.’

**Twist of Fate (Psychic)**
Change to:

‘Select one enemy unit within 24” of and visible to the manifesting model. Until the end of the phase, each time a **THOUSAND SONS** or **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 12+, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 2 instead.’

question.en: While using the Subterranean Assault Detachment, does a Mawloc’s Terror from the Deep ability trigger when arriving via a Tunnel Marker?
What is the effect of the Unseen Lurkers Stratagem with respect to the Balance Dataslate ruling on Stratagems that prevent units from being targeted?

answer.en:
The effect of the Unseen Lurkers Stratagem becomes:
‘**EFFECT**: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18" or, if your unit has the Lone Operative ability, if the attacking model is within 6". Your opponent can select new targets for the attacking unit’s attacks.’

question.en: Do units that are repositioned by rules that do not specify that the unit being repositioned is first placed into Reserves (e.g. the Grey Knights Teleport Assault rule) need to take a Battle-shock test on a roll of 2+ if a **TYRANIDS CHARACTER** with the Hunting Grounds Enhancement is on the battlefield?

answer.en: Yes. Rules that are triggered by or apply to Reserves units are also triggered by and apply to a repositioned unit when it is set back up.

question.en: Can I use the Rapid Regeneration Stratagem when an ability like Doombolt or Vortex of Doom would inflict mortal wounds on a **TYRANIDS** unit from my army?

When resolving a Mawloc’s Terror From the Deep ability, which units need to take a Battle-shock test: every unit within 12" of the Mawloc, or only those units for which a 5+ was rolled when resolving that ability?

answer.en: Only those units for which a 5+ was rolled.

question.en: If my opponent uses a rule to place a unit into Strategic Reserves during the first battle round, and that rule states that the unit must arrive on the battlefield in the next battle round, what happens if a model from my army uses the Psychostatic Disruption Enhancement in the second battle round when that enemy Strategic Reserves unit is due to arrive?

answer.en: The ‘cannot arrive’ rule takes precedence over the rule stating that the unit ‘must arrive’ from Strategic Reserves. Roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit cannot arrive on the battlefield this turn.

question.en: If I select a unit of Neurogaunts for a Neurotyrant’s Neuroloids ability that is not led by a **SYNAPSE** unit, does that unit of Neurogaunts gain the **SYNAPSE** keyword?
When using the Reclaim Biomass Stratagem, can the Stratagem effect be used on the unit that was just destroyed?
Does an Attached unit containing a Hive Tyrant and Tyrant Guard receive the Stealth ability from a Venomthrope’s Foul Spores ability?

answer.en: No. The unit has the **MONSTER** keyword and the ability excludes **MONSTERS**.

question.en: Are Spore Mines units that are added to an army during a battle restricted by abilities that prevent Reserves from being set up within a certain range (e.g. Space Marines Infiltrators’ Omniscrambers)?

Do rules such as the Insurmountable Odds Detachment rule and the Carnifexes’ Blistering Assault ability let me choose between not moving the unit in question or moving the unit as far as possible following the conditions?
If I roll one D6 for a Carnifexes unit’s Blistering Assault move and then choose not to move the models, do they still count as having made a Blistering Assault move that phase?

answer.en: Yes, they have made a Blistering Assault move of 0".

question.en: When a **CARNIFEX** model makes a Blistering Assault move or an **ENDLESS MULTITUDE** model makes a Surge move, does that model have to move the full amount allowed by the dice result?

answer.en: No, it can move any distance up to that allowed distance.

question.en: Does a unit affected by the Psychostatic Disruption Enhancement have to arrive from Reserves in the next Movement phase?
Does the Synaptic Goading Stratagem allow a unit to leave Engagement Range and move towards the closest objective marker?
Can units targeted by the Shadow in the Warp army rule use the Insane Bravery Stratagem?

answer.en: No. Insane Bravery can only be used in your Command phase.

errataHeader.en: Maulerfiend, Scent Of Blood Ability

errataText.en:
Change to:
'In the Charge phase, when this unit **declares a charge**:
■ If an enemy unit **below starting strength** is within 9" of this unit, this unit has +1 to **charge rolls**.
■ <u>Or:</u> If an enemy unit **below half strength** is within 9" of this unit, this unit has +2 to **charge rolls**.'

errataHeader.en: Slaughterbound, Melee Weapons, Lacerator and Daemonic Claw

errataText.en: Change **S** to '10'.

question.en: Can I use the Summoned by Slaughter Stratagem to deploy Bloodletters in the first battle round?

answer.en: Bloodletter units that started the battle in Reserves cannot deploy in the first battle round using the Summoned by Slaughter Stratagem. Bloodletter units that started the battle on the battlefield and have subsequently been placed into Strategic Reserves can deploy in the first battle round.

question.en: If Angron is destroyed and I use his Reborn in Blood ability, can I still use the Wrath of Khorne Detachment ability for the Vessels of Wrath Detachment?
While using the Khorne Daemonkin Detachment, can I select a **CHARACTER** with the Disciple of Khorne Enhancement to be my **WARLORD**?

While using the Khorne Daemonkin Detachment, if I attach a Lord on Juggernaut with the Disciple of Khorne Enhancement to a unit of Bloodcrushers or Flesh Hounds, does that unit benefit from the Blessings of Khorne ability, even though only the Lord on Juggernaut has that ability?
Can an attached unit be given an Upgrade?
question.de: Kann eine angeschlossene Einheit eine Aufwertung erhalten?
question.es: ¿Pueda una unidad adjunta recibir un talento?
question.fr: Une unité attachée peut-elle rececoir une Amélioration ?
question.it: Posso dare una Miglioria a un'unità Aggregata?
question.ja: 合流ユニットにアップグレードを与えることはできるのか？
question.ko: 합류 유닛에 업그레이드를 부여할 수 있나요?
question.zh: 联合单位可以拥有升级吗?

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: 可能だ。
answer.zh: 可以。

name.ja: アーミーロスターの作成

question.en: When declaring the allocation order of groups in my unit I have more than one non-<k>CHARACTER</k> groups that contain a model with a missing wound, how must I select the order?
question.de: Wenn ich die Zuweisungsreihenfolge für Gruppen in einer Einheit ansage, die mehr als eine Gruppe enthält, welche kein <k>CHARAKTERMODELL</k> ist und ein Modell enthält, das mindestens einen Lebenspunkt verloren hat, wie bestimme ich die Reihenfolge?
question.es: Al declarar el orden de asignación de grupos en mi unidad, si tengo más de un grupo que no es <k>PERSONAJE</k> e incluye alguna miniatura que ha perdido alguna herida, ¿cómo elijo el orden?
question.fr: Au moment d'annoncer l'ordre d'allocation pour mon unité, j'ai plus d'un groupe n'étant pas de <k>PERSONNAGE</k> qui inclut une figurine qui a perdu un point de vue. Comment dois-je sélectionner l'ordre?
question.it: Se quando dichiaro l’ordine di assegnazione dei gruppi nella mia unità ho più di un gruppo non-<k>PERSONAGGIO</k> che contiene un modello che ha perso ferita, come devo selezionare l’ordine?
question.ja: 自軍ユニットに、【負傷限界】を失っている兵を含んでいる<k>キャラクター</k>ではないグループが複数含まれている場合、そのユニットの割り振り順を宣言する際、どのような順番で選択しなければならないのか？
question.ko: 아군 유닛의 그룹 사이에서 할당 순서를 결정할 때, 체력을 잃은 모델을 보유한 <k>캐릭터 제외</k> 그룹이 유닛에 둘 이상 있다면, 순서를 어떻게 결정해야 하나요?
question.zh: 在为单位建立豁免掷骰的群组时，如果我的单位中存在多个非<k>角色</k>群组，并且它们都包含一个失去了一点耐伤的模型，那么应该如何决定分配顺序？

answer.en: Those groups can be selected in an order of your choosing but must be in an order that makes them come before any non-<k>CHARACTER</k> groups that do not contain a model with a missing wound.
answer.de: Jene Gruppen können in einer Reihenfolge deiner Wahl bestimmt werden, müssen aber vor etwaigen Gruppen, welche kein <k>CHARAKTERMODELL</k> enthalten und kein Modell enthalten, das mindestens einen Lebenspunkt verloren hat, an die Reihe kommen.
answer.es: Esos grupos pueden elegirse en el orden que quieras, pero deben ir antes que cualquier grupo no <k>PERSONAJE</k> que no incluya miniaturas que hayan perdido alguna herida.
answer.fr: Vous pouvez choisir ces groupes dans l'ordre de votre choix, mais vous devez le faire dans un ordre qui les fait venir avant tout groupe n'étant pas de <k>PERSONNAGE</k> qui n'inclut pas de figurine qui a perdu un ou plusieurs points de vie.
answer.it: Puoi selezionare quei gruppi in un ordine a tua scelta, ma deve venire prima di qualsiasi di qualsiasi gruppo non-<k>PERSONAGGIO</k> che non contenga un modello che ha perso una ferita.
answer.ja: これらのグループは任意の順番で割り当て順を選択できるが、【負傷限界】を失っている兵を含んでいない、<k>キャラクター</k>ではないグループよりも先に選択しなければならない。
answer.ko: 플레이어가 마음대로 결정할 수 있으나, 체력을 잃은 모델을 보유하지 않은 <k>캐릭터 제외</k> 그룹보다 먼저 할당해야 합니다.
answer.zh: 您可以按照自己选择的顺序来进行决定，但是上述的这些群组必须位于任何不包含失去耐伤的模型的非<k>角色</k>群组之前。

question.en: What does the X" in Lone Operative X" mean?
question.de: Was bedeutet das X" in Einsamer Wolf X"?
question.es: ¿Qué quiere decir la X en Agente solitario X"?
question.fr: Que signifie le X" dans Agent Solitaire X"?
question.it: Cosa significa la X" in Agente Solitario X"?
question.ja: 『単独工作員Xmv』のXmvは何を意味しているのか？
question.ko: 단독 요원 X"에서 X"는 무엇을 뜻하나요?
question.zh: 独行特工 X" 当中的 X" 是什么意思？

answer.en: The X is a placeholder for a number of inches that the ability might appear in a rule with, like Lone Operative 15" where the X has been replaced with 15"
answer.de: Das X ist ein Platzhalter für eine Anzahl an Zoll, innerhalb der die Fähigkeit Anwendung findet, beispielsweise Einsamer Wolf 15".
answer.es: La X indica que en esa posición irá el número de pulgadas relativo a esa habilidad; por ejemplo, en Agente solitario 15", en el lugar de la X hay 15".
answer.fr: Le X est un substitut provisoire pour un nombre de pouces donné qui s'applique à l'aptitude correspondant, ex. Agent Solitaire 15".
answer.it: La X sta per il numero di pollici all'interno dei quali si applica la regola, comeAgente Solitario 15".
answer.ja: Xは、そのアビリティが適用される範囲を表している（例『単独工作員15mv』）。
answer.ko: X는 규칙에 적용되는 인치 단위의 거리를 나타내는 기호로, 예를 들어 단독 요원 15"로 표기됩니다.
answer.zh: 这里的“X”代表了那个技能适用范围的英寸数值，例如独行特工 15"。

question.en: Can a unit have both an Upgrade and an enhancement?
question.de: Kann eine Einheit sowohl eine Aufwertung als auch eine Verbesserung haben?
question.es: ¿Puede una unidad recibir un talento y una mejora?
question.fr: Une unité peut-elle avoir à la fois une Amélioration et une optimisation ?
question.it: Un'unità può avere sia una Miglioria che un potenziamento?
question.ja: 同じユニットがアップグレードと 強化を両方持つことはできるのか？
question.ko: 유닛은 업그레이드와 강화를 동시에 보유할 수 있나요?
question.zh: 一个单位可以同时拥有升级和强化吗?

answer.en: No, units are prevented from having two enhancements, and Upgrades are enhancements.
answer.de: Nein. Einheiten dürfen keine zwei Verbesserungen haben und Aufwertungen sind Verbesserungen.
answer.es: No, una unidad no puede tener dos mejoras, y un talento es una mejora.
answer.fr: Non, une unité ne peut pas avoir plusieurs optimisations, or les Améliorations sont des optimisations.
answer.it: No, le unità non possono avere due potenziamenti e le Migliorie sono potenziamenti.
answer.ja: できない（ユニットは強化を2個持つことはできず、アップグレードは強化であるため）。
answer.ko: 아니요, 유닛은 두 개의 강화를 동시에 보유할 수 없으며, 업그레이드는 강화의 일종입니다.
answer.zh: 不行，一个单位不能拥有两个强化，而升级也是强化。

name.ja: アーミーロスターの作成

question.en: Are Upgrades enhancements?
question.de: Sind Aufwertungen Verbesserungen?
question.es: ¿Son los talentos mejoras?
question.fr: Les Améliorations sont-elles des optimisations ?
question.it: Le Migliorie sono potenziamenti?
question.ja: アップグレードは強化として扱われるのか？
question.ko: 업그레이드는 강화인가요?
question.zh: 升级是强化吗？

answer.en: Yes, Upgrades are a type of enhancement (but not all enhancements are Upgrades).
answer.de: Ja, Aufwertungen sind eine Art Verbesserung (aber nicht alle Verbesserungen sind Aufwertungen).
answer.es: Sí, los talentos son un tipo de mejora (pero no todas las mejoras son talentos).
answer.fr: Oui, les Améliorations sont un type d'optimisation (mais toutes les optimisations ne sont pas des Améliorations).
answer.it: Sì, le Migliorie sono un tipo di potenziamento (ma non tutti i potenziamenti sono Migliorie).
answer.ja: その通りだ。アップグレードは強化の一種類である（ただしすべての強化がアップグレードではない）。
answer.ko: 예, 업그레이드는 강화의 일종입니다(하지만 모든 강화가 업그레이드인 것은 아닙니다).
answer.zh: 是的，升级是一种强化类型（但不是所有的强化都是升级）。

name.ja: アーミーロスターの作成

question.en: If a rule says a unit auto passes Desperate Escape tests does that mean it would auto pass the hazard rolls from a desperate escape move?
question.de: Wenn eine Regel besagt, dass eine Einheit automatisch Fluchttests besteht, bedeutet das, dass die Risikowürfe, die als Teil einer Verzweifelte-Flucht-Bewegung ausgeführt werden, automatisch erfolgreich sind?
question.es: Si una regla dice que una unidad supera automáticamente chequeos de huida desesperada, ¿eso significa que supera las tiradas de riesgo debido a un movimiento de huida desesperada?
question.fr: Si une règle stipule qu'une unité réussit automatiquement les tests de Fuite Désespérée, cela signifie-t-il que ses jets de risque faits en conséquence du mode fuite désespérée sont automatiquement réussis?
question.it: Se una regola indica che un'unità supera automaticamente i test di Fuga Disperata, significa che i suoi tiri pericolo effettuati come conseguenza della modalità fuga disperata hanno automaticamente successo?
question.ja: 「ユニットは決死の脱出テストに自動的に成功する」というルールがある場合、それは決死の脱出モードで発生する危機ロールに自動的に成功するという意味か？
question.ko: 규칙이 필사적인 탈출 체크를 자동으로 통과한다고 명시한다면, 그 말은 필사적인 탈출 하부 유형의 위험 굴림을 자동으로 통과한다는 뜻인가요?
question.zh: 如果一个规则表示单位会自动通过狼狈逃亡测试，那么它的意思是不是指那次狼狈逃亡模式导致的危险掷骰会自动通过？

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: その通りだ。
answer.zh: 是的。

question.en: If a unit has a rule that allows it to start an action when it is battle-shocked can it also continue doing that action if it becomes battle-shocked after starting an action?
question.de: Wenn eine Einheit eine Regel hat, die ihr ermöglicht, eine Aktion zu beginnen, wenn sie erschüttert ist, kann sie diese Aktion auch weiter ausführen, wenn sie erschüttert wird, nachdem sie mit dem Ausführen jener Aktion begonnen hat?
question.es: Si una unidad tiene una regla que le permite iniciar una acción estando acobardada, ¿puede también seguir realizando esa acción si queda acobardada tras iniciar esa acción?
question.fr: Si une unité a une règle lui permettant d'entreprendre une action quand elle est ébranlée peut-elle continuer à effectuer cette action si elle devient ébranlée après avoir entrepris l'action?
question.it: Se un’unità ha una regola che le consente di iniziare un’azione quando è traumatizzata, può continuare a svolgere quell’azione anche se diventa traumatizzata dopo aver iniziato quell' azione?
question.ja: ユニットが戦闘ショック状態になった場合でもアクションの開始を可能にするルールが適用されている場合、そのアクションを開始した後で戦闘ショック状態になったとしても、そのアクションを継続して行える？
question.ko: 유닛의 규칙에 그 유닛이 전투충격 상태일 때 특수 행동을 시작하게 해주는 내용이 있다면, 그 유닛이 특수 행동을 시작한 뒤 전투 충격 상태가 되어도 그 특수 행동을 지속해 수행할 수 있나요?
question.zh: 如果一个单位拥有允许它在战斗震慑状态的情况下开始一次行动的规则，那么如果这个单位在开始一次行动后进入战斗震慑状态，那么是否会继续执行那次 行动？

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: その通りだ。
answer.zh: 是的。

question.en: When selecting a target unit can the enemy model that is visible to my model and the enemy model that is in range of my model's weapon be different enemy models in the same unit?
question.de: Wenn ich eine Zieleinheit wähle, kann das für mein Modell sichtbare feindliche Modell ein anderes Modell derselben feindlichen Einheit sein als das feindliche Modell, das sich innerhalb der Reichweite der Waffe meines Modells befindet?
question.es: Al elegir una unidad blanco, ¿pueden la miniatura enemiga que es visible para mi miniatura y la miniatura enemiga que está dentro del alcance del arma de mi miniatura ser miniaturas enemigas distintas de la misma unidad enemiga?
question.fr: Quand je choisis une unité cible, la figurine ennemie qui est visible de ma figurine et la figurine ennemie qui est à portée de l'arme de ma figurine peuvent-elles êtres différentes au sein de la même unité ennemie?
question.it: Quando scelgo un’unità bersaglio, il modello nemico che è visibile al mio modello e il modello nemico che si trova nella gittata dell’arma del mio modello possono essere due modelli diversi della stessa unità?
question.ja: 対象のユニットを選択する際、自分の兵から視認状態である敵兵と、自分の兵の武器の【射程】の範囲内に敵兵は、それらの敵兵が同じ敵ユニット内にいるならば、異なる敵兵同士であっても良いのか？
question.ko: 대상 유닛을 지정할 때, 아군 모델의 시야에 들어온 적 모델과 아군 모델이 보유한 무기의 사거리 내에 있는 적 모델이 같은 적 유닛 내에 있는 다른 적 모델이어도 괜찮나요?
question.zh: 在选择一个目标单位时，对己方模型可见的敌方模型和位于己方模型武器范围内的敌方模型是否可以是同一个敌方单位中的不同模型？

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: その通りだ。
answer.zh: 可以。

question.en: If a rule modifies how far a unit or model can move during a pile-in move or consolidation move does it also change the distance of the target units?
question.de: Wenn eine Regel mir erlaubt, meine Einheit während einer Nachrücken-/Neuordnenbewegung weiter zu bewegen, wird dadurch auch die Entfernung erhöht, bis zu der feindliche Einheiten für jene Bewegung infrage kommende Ziele sind?
question.es: Si una regla permite que mi unidad se mueva más lejos durante un movimiento de agruparse/consolidar, ¿extiende también esa regla el alcance dentro del cual las unidades enemigas pueden ser objetivos válidos para ese movimiento?
question.fr: Si une règle permet à mon unité de se déplacer plus loin lors d'un mouvement d'insertion/consolidation, cette règle change-t-elle aussi la distance à laquelle doivent se trouver les unités ennemies qui sont des cibles éligibles pour ce mouvement?
question.it: Se una regola consente alla mia unità di muoversi ulteriormente durante un movimento di ammassamento/consolidamento, estende anche la distanza per la quale le unità nemiche sono bersagli idonei per quel movimento?
question.ja: 接敵移動/再編移動中に、自軍のユニットが移動可能な距離が増加するルールが適用されている場合、そのルールは、その移動の対象にできる敵ユニットの範囲も増加するのか？
question.ko: 밀착/규합 이동 중 이동 거리를 늘리는 규칙이 적 유닛이 그 이동의 유효 대상인 거리까지 늘려주나요?
question.zh: 如果一个规则允许我的单位在跟进/重整移动中移动更远距离，那这条规则是否也意味着那次移动中敌方单位能够成为有效目标的范围也增加了？

answer.it: No.
answer.ja: しない。
answer.zh: 不会。

question.en: How many mortals do you take from Hazardous tests for a combined vehicle/monster and Infantry unit
question.de: Wenn mir ein Risikowurf für eine Monster-/Fahrzeug-Einheit misslingt, die ebenfalls ein Infanterie-Modell enthält, wie viele tödliche Verwundungen erleidet jene Einheit?
question.es: Si fallo una tirada de riesgo para una unidad Monstruo/Vehículo que también incluye alguna miniatura Infantería, ¿cuántas heridas mortales sufre esa unidad?
question.fr: Si je rate un jet de risque pour une unité de Monstre/Véhicule qui contient aussi une figurine d'Infanterie, combien de blessures mortelles cette unité subit?
question.it: Se fallisco un tiro pericolo per un'unità Mostro/Veicolo che contiene anche un modello di Fanteria, quante ferite mortali subisce quell'unità?
question.ja: モンスター/ビークル・ユニットの危機ロールに失敗した時、そのユニットにインファントリー・兵も含まれていたならば、そのユニットが受ける致命的ダメージは何ポイントになるのか？
question.ko: 제가 보병 모델을 포함한 괴수/기체 유닛을 대상으로 하는 위험 굴림에 실패한다면, 그 유닛이 얼마나 많은 치명상을 입나요?
question.zh: 如果我在为凶兽/载具单位进行危险掷骰 时掷骰失败，而那个单位中又包含一个步兵模型，那么那个单位会受到多少处 致命伤？

answer.en: The roll would be all at once and it would be 1 MW per fail
answer.de: 1 tödliche Verwundung pro misslungenem Risikowurf, da jene Einheit nicht vollständig aus Monster-/Fahrzeug-Modellen besteht.
answer.es: 1 herida mortal por cada tirada de riesgo fallida, ya que esa unidad no está compuesta enteramente por miniaturas Monstruo/Vehículo.
answer.fr: 1 blessure mortelle par jet de risque raté, car l'unité n'est pas entièrement composée de figurines de Monstre/Véhicule.
answer.it: 1 ferita mortale per tiro pericolo fallito, dal momento che quell'unità non è interamente composta da modelli di Mostro/Veicolo.
answer.ja: ユニット全体がモンスター/ビークル・兵で構成されていないユニットの場合、危機ロールを1回失敗するごとに1ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
answer.ko: 그 유닛이 괴수/기체 모델로만 구성되어 있지 않으므로, 실패한 위험 굴림 하나당 1 치명상을 입습니다.
answer.zh: 每次失败的 危险掷骰 1 处 致命伤，因为那个单位不仅包含凶兽/载具模型。

question.en: Are models that are within the boundary of a terrain area, but not on the ground floor of a terrain area (e.g. overhanging parts of FRAME VEHICLES or models on terrain features that are within that terrain area) within that terrain area?
question.de: Befinden sich Modelle innerhalb der Begrenzungen eines Geländebereichs, aber nicht auf dem Bodenniveau jenes Geländebereichs (z. B. hervorstehende Teile von UMRISS-FAHRZEUGEN oder Modelle auf Geländestücken, die sich in jenem Geländebereich befinden), innerhalb von jenem Geländebereich?
question.es: ¿Las miniaturas que están dentro del límite de un área de terreno, pero no en el nivel de suelo de un área de terreno (p. ej., las partes que sobresalen de un VEHÍCULO FIGURA o miniaturas sobre elementos de terreno que estén dentro de esa área de terreno), están dentro de esa área de terreno?
question.fr: Est-ce que les figurines qui sont dans le périmètre d'une zone de terrain, mais pas au niveau du sol d'un élément de terrain (ex. les partie de VÉHICULE à CHÂSSIS qui débordent dessus ou les figurines sur des éléments de terrain qui sont dans cette zone de terrain) sont dans cette zone de terrain?
question.it: I modelli posizionati entro i confini di un'area di terreno ma non al piano terra di un'area di terreno (per esempio le parti sporgenti di un VEICOLO con SAGOMA o i modelli che si trovano sopra un elemento di terreno collocato entro quell'area di terreno) si trovano entro quell'area di terreno?
question.ja: すべての兵が地形エリアの境界線内にいるが、地形エリアの地上面には居ない状態とする（例：フレーム・ビークルの一部がはみ出していたり、地形エリアの範囲内にある特殊地形の上に兵がいる状態）。この場合は、その地形エリア内にいるものとして扱われるのか？
question.ko: 모델이 지형 범위의 경계 내에 있지만 지형 범위의 지면에 있지는 않다면(예: 지형 범위 내에 있는 지형지물에 모델이 놓인 경우, 또는 동체 기체의 돌출 부위), 그 모델은 그 지형 범위 내에 있는 것인가요?
question.zh: 位于地形区域边界内，但不位于地形区域底层的模型（例如：外壳载具的悬空部分，或位于地形区域中地形模型上的模型）是否位于地形区域内？

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: その通りだ。
answer.zh: 是的。

question.en: Do rules that affect a keyword include multi-word keywords that contain that keyword? For example, would rules that affect <k>Commissar</k> units affect a unit that has the <k>Commissar Graves</k> keyword?
question.de: Betreffen Regeln mit Bezug auf ein Schlüsselwort auch Schlüsselwörter aus mehreren Wörtern, die jenes Schlüsselwort enthalten? Betreffen zum Beispiel Regeln, die <k>Kommissar</k>-Einheiten betreffen, eine Einheit, die das Schlüsselwort <k>Kommissarin Graves</k> hat?
question.es: ¿Las reglas que afectan a una clave incluyen claves con varias palabras que contienen esa clave? Por ejemplo, las reglas que afectan a las unidades <k>Comisario</k> afectarían a una unidad con la clave <k>Comisaria Graves</k>?
question.fr: Est-ce que les règles qui affectent un mot-clé incluent les mots-clés multiples qui contiennent ce mot-clé? Par exemple, les règles qui affectent les unités de  <k>Commissaire</k> affectent-elles une unité qui a le mot-clé <k>Commissaire Graves</k>?
question.it: Le regole che influenzano una data keyword, influenzano anche keyword formate da più parole fra cui quella particolare keyword? Per esempio, una regola che influenza le unità <k>Commissario</k> influenza anche un'unità che ha la keyword <k>Commissario Graves</k> ?
question.ja: キーワードによって影響を及ぼすルールは、そのキーワードを含んで複数の単語から成るキーワードを持つ場合にも適用されるのか？例えば仮に、<k>政治将校</k>・ユニットに影響を与えるルールがあるとすれば、それは<k>政治将校グレイヴス</k>のキーワードを持つユニットにも影響を与えることができるのか？
question.ko: 한 키워드에 영향을 미치는 규칙은, 그 키워드를 포함해 여러 단어로 구성된 키워드에도 적용되나요? 예를 들어, <k>커미사르</k> 유닛에 영향을 미치는 규칙은 <k>커미사르 그레이브즈</k> 키워드를 보유한 유닛에도 영향을 미치나요?
question.zh: 对关键词生效的规则是否也会对包含该关键词的多词关键词生效？例如，对<k>政委</k>单位生效的规则是否也会对拥有<k>格雷夫斯政委</k>关键词的单位生效？

answer.it: No.
answer.ja: できない。
answer.zh: 不会。

question.en: My rule says that "this units ranged attacks have +1 A", do each of my attacks get an extra attack dice?
question.de: Eine Regel besagt, dass die Attacken meiner Einheit „+1 A“ haben. Erhalte ich für jede jener Attacken einen zusätzlichen Attackenwürfel?
question.es: Una regla que dice que los ataques a distancia de mi unidad tienen "+1 a A". ¿Gana cada uno de esos ataques algún dado de ataque extra?
question.fr: Une règle dit que les attaques de tir de mon unité ont "+1 en A". Cela signifie-t-il que chacune de ces attaques a un dé d'attaque bonus?
question.it: Una regola dice che gli attacchi della mia unità hanno '+1 A'. Ognuno di quegli attacchi ottiene un dado attaccoaddizionale?
question.ja: 自軍のユニットの攻撃の【数】は+1の修正を受ける、というルールがある場合、攻撃1回につき、それぞれ追加の攻撃ダイスを1回ずつロールするのか？
question.ko: 규칙에 제 유닛의 공격에 공격 +1를 적용한다고 되어 있으면, 그 유닛이 매번 공격할 때마다 공격 주사위를 추가로 하나씩 얻는 건가요?
question.zh: 一个规则中，我的一个单位的攻击拥有“ +1 A”。这是否意味着每次攻击都拥有额外的攻击骰？

answer.en: No, it increases the A characteristics of the unit's ranged weapons by 1.
answer.de: Nein, es bedeutet, dass die A-Werte der Waffen der Einheit um 1 erhöht werden.
answer.es: No, aumenta en 1 los atributos A de las armas de la unidad.
answer.fr: Non, cela augmente de 1 les caractéristiques d'A des armes de l'unité.
answer.it: No, aumenta di 1 le caratteristiche A delle armi dell’unità.
answer.ja: そうではない。このルールは、ユニットの武器の【数】の能力値を+1する。
answer.ko: 아니요, 그 규칙은 그 유닛이 보유한 무기의 공격 수치에 +1을 적용할 뿐입니다.
answer.zh: 不，这里指的是该单位的武器的A 属性提升 1。

question.en: I failed hazard rolls from [Hazardous] weapons, do those mortal wounds have to be allocated to the models with the [Hazardous] weapons?
question.de: Mir sind Risikowürfe für [riskante] Waffen misslungen, müssen jene tödlichen Verwundungen den Modellen mit den [riskanten] Waffen zugewiesen werden?
question.es: Si fallo las tiradas de riesgo de armas [De riesgo], ¿esas heridas mortales deben asignarse a las miniaturas con armas [De riesgo]?
question.fr: J'ai raté des jets de risque pour des armes [À Risque], ces blessures mortelles doivent-être allouées aux figurines ayant lesdites armes [À Risque]?
question.it: Se fallisco tiri pericolo dovuti ad armi [Pericolose], devo assegnare quelle ferite mortali ai modelli con le armi [Pericolose]?
question.ja: ［暴発］武器の危機ロールに失敗した場合、その致命的ダメージは、その［暴発］武器を持つ兵に割り振らなければならないのか？
question.ko: [위험] 무기로 인한 위험 굴림을 실패한다면, 그로 인한 치명상은 그 [위험] 무기를 보유한 모델에게 할당해야 하나요?
question.zh: 在使用[危险] 武器后进行的危险掷骰失败时，这些 致命伤 是否必须被分配至一个装备那件 [危险] 武器的模型？

answer.en: No, you allocate the mortal wounds to the unit as per Mortal Wounds(06.02). (This represents Bob the guardsmen picking up his fallen squad mates plasma gun or that the twisting power of James the Chaos Sorcerer pulling his followers into the warp.)
answer.de: Nein, du weist der Einheit die tödlichen Verwundungen gemäß Tödliche Verwundungen (06.02) zu.Dies stellt dar, wie eine Kameradin des gefallenen Kriegers dessen Waffe aufsammelt oder wie die Gefolgsleute eines Psionikers in den Warp gerissen werden.
answer.es: No, asignas las heridas mortales a la unidad como se indica en Heridas mortales (06.02).Esto representa que otro soldado recoge el arma de su compañero caído, o que el poder descontrolado de un psíquico consume a sus seguidores.
answer.fr: Non, vous allouez les blessures mortelles à l'unité selon Blessures Mortelles(06.02). Ceci représente des événements comme un camarade ramassant l'arme d'un guerrier tué, ou les sbires d'un psykers entraînés dans le warp.
answer.it: No, assegna le ferite mortali all'unità come indicato in Ferite Mortali (06.02). Ciò rappresenta quelle situazioni in cui l'arma di un guerriero ucciso viene raccolta da un compagno o i seguaci di uno psionico vengono trascinati nel Warp, ad esempio.
answer.ja: その必要はない。致命的ダメージは「致命的ダメージ（06.02）」の記述に従って、ユニットに与えられる。この例では、撃破された戦士の武器を味方が拾ったり、サイカーの従者が〈歪み〉の中に引きずり込まれるといった出来事を表している。
answer.ko: 아니오, 그로 인한 치명상은 치명상(06.02) 섹션의 내용에 따라 유닛에 할당해야 합니다.이는 동료가 죽은 전사의 무기를 집어들거나, 사이커의 추종자가 워프로 끌려가는 등의 현상을 나타냅니다.
answer.zh: 不，根据致命伤规则（06.02）的描述，您对那个单位分配致命伤。这样的情况代表了同袍战士捡起了死去队友的武器，或者灵能者的追随者被拖进了亚空间之中。

question.en: After using an ability that increases the CP cost of a stratagem, must my opponent continue to use the selected stratagem at the increased cost if they have the necessary CP available?
question.de: Nachdem ich eine Fähigkeit eingesetzt habe, die die BP-Kosten einer Gefechtsoption erhöht, muss mein Gegner mit dem Einsatz der gewählten Gefechtsoption zu den erhöhten Kosten fortfahren, sofern er die entsprechenden BP hat?
question.es: Tras usar una habilidad que incrementa el coste en PM de una estratagema, ¿debe mi oponente seguir usando la estratagema seleccionada con el coste aumentado si tiene los PM necesarios disponibles?
question.fr: Après avoir utilisé une aptitude qui majore le coût en PC d'un stratagème, mon adversaire doit-il continuer à utiliser le stratagème choisi au coût majoré s'il dispose des PC nécessaires?
question.it: Quando uso un'abilità che aumenta il costo in PC di uno stratagemma, se l'avversario ha a disposizione i PC necessari, è obbligato a usare comunque lo stratagemma scelto pagando il costo maggiorato?
question.ja: 策略の消費CPを増加させるアビリティを使用した後、対戦相手は、増加後の策略発動に必要なCPを持っているならば、その選択された策略は必ず使用しなければならないのか？
question.ko: 스트라타젬의 CP 소모량을 증가시키는 능력을 사용한 후, 증가된 만큼의 CP를 보유하고 있는 상대 플레이어는 자신이 선택한 스트라타젬을 증가된 비용을 소모해 사용해야만 하나요?
question.zh: 在对一个计谋使用增加 CP 花费的技能后，如果我的对手拥有足够的 CP，他们是否必须花费增加的 CP，继续使用选择的计谋？

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: その通りだ。
answer.zh: 是的。

question.en: Can a model be within range of a weapon if it is not visible
question.de: Kann sich ein Modell in Reichweite einer Waffe befinden, wenn es nicht sichtbar ist?
question.es: ¿Puede una miniatura estar dentro del alcance de una arma si no es visible?
question.fr: Une figurine peut-elle être à portée d'une arme si elle n'est pas visible?
question.it: Un modello può essere nella gittata di un'arma se non è visibile?
question.ja: 兵を視認できない場合でも、その兵が、武器の射程の範囲内に入っているという状態は起こり得るのか？
question.ko: 모델이 시야에 들어오지 않았어도 무기의 사거리 내에 들어갈 수 있나요?
question.zh: 在一个模型不可见时，它是否依旧可以位于武器的范围内。

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: その通りだ。
answer.zh: 可以。

question.en: I have a unit being attacked with weapons that will modify some of their save rolls to be worse then 6 should I make those save rolls?
question.de: Meine Einheit wird von Attacken getroffen, die einige Rüstungswürfe ihrer Modelle auf schlechter als 6 modifizieren. Soll ich jene Rüstungswürfe dennoch ausführen?
question.es: Mi unidad es atacada con armas que modifican algunas de las tiradas de salvación de sus miniatura hasta ser peores que 6, ¿debo hacer siquiera esas tiradas de salvación?
question.fr: Mon unité est attaquée avec des armes qui modifieront les jets de sauvegarde de certaines de ses figurines en les dégradant au-delà de 6. Dois-je quand même faire ces jets de sauvegarde?
question.it: Una mia unità viene attaccata con armi che modificano alcuni tiri salvezza dei suoi modelli rendendoli peggiori di 6. Devo effettuare comunque quei tiri salvezza?
question.ja: 自軍のユニットが、その兵のセーヴロールの一部を6より悪化させるような攻撃を受けているとする。この場合でも、それらのセーヴロールを行うべきか？
question.ko: 내 유닛에 속한 모델의 방호 굴림이 그 수치를 보정하는 무기로 공격을 당해 6보다 안 좋은 수치가 되어도 방호 굴림을 굴려야 하나요?
question.zh: 在我的单位受到攻击时，如果武器将其中一些模型的豁免掷骰属性修正到了 6 以上。我是否仍应该进行这些豁免掷骰？

answer.en: Yes, because other models in your unit may have Sv's that are better those models you've mentioned, this means that enough save rolls could be allocated to the those models that the rest of the results are not greater then the Sv's of the other models in your unit.
answer.de: Ja, denn andere Modelle deiner Einheit könnten einen besseren RW haben, was bedeutet, dass jenen Modellen genug Rüstungswürfe zugewiesen werden könnten, dass die restlichen Ergebnisse nicht höher sind als der RW anderer Modelle deiner Einheit.
answer.es: Sí, porque otras miniaturas de tu unidad pueden tener una S mejor, lo que significa que podrían asignarse suficientes tiradas de salvación a esas miniaturas para que los resultados restantes no sean mayores que la S de las otras miniaturas de tu unidad.
answer.fr: Oui, car d'autres figurines de votre unité ont peut-être une meilleure Sv, si bien qu'en allouant assez de jets de sauvegarde auxdites figurines, le reste des résultats ne devrait pas être supérieurs à la Sv des autres figurines de votre unité.
answer.it: Sì, perché altri modelli nella tua unità possono avere una S migliore; ciò significa che puoi assegnare abbastanza tiri salvezza a quei modelli da fare in modo che i risultati restanti non siano superiori alla S degli altri modelli della tua unità.
answer.ja: その通りだ。なぜならば、その自軍ユニット内の他の兵が、より優れた【防】を持っている場合がある。その場合、まずそれらの兵にセーヴロールを割り当てた後、残った攻撃に対して、同じユニット内でより良好な【防】を持つ兵でセーヴロールを試みることができる。
answer.ko: 예, 왜냐하면 유닛의 다른 모델이 말씀하신 모델보다 좋은 방호 수치를 가지고 있을 수 있으며, 그렇다면 여전히 충분한 방호 굴림을 그 모델에 할당해 그 유닛에 속한 타 모델의 방호수치와 같거나 더 낮은 결과를 얻을 수 있기 때문입니다.
answer.zh: 应该进行，因为您的单位中的其他模型可能会拥有更高的 Sv，意味着您可以使用这些数值更高的单位来进行豁免掷骰，以此来避免那些Sv较低的其他模型受到伤害。

question.en: If a rule says my unit must make a hazard roll does every model in the unit make a hazard roll?
question.de: Wenn eine Regel besagt, dass eine Einheit einen Risikowurf ausführen muss, muss dann jedes Modell jener Einheit einen Risikowurf ausführen?
question.es: Si una regla dice que mi unidad debe hacer una tirada de riesgo, ¿tiene que hacer la tirada de riesgo cada miniatura de la unidad?
question.fr: Si un règle demande de mon unité qu'elle fasse un jet de risque, chaque figurine de l'unité doit-elle faire un jet de risque?
question.it: Se una regola stabilisce che la mia unità deve effettuare un tiro pericolo, ogni modello dell’unità deve effettuare un tiro pericolo?
question.ja: 自軍のユニットが危機ロールを行わなければならないルールを適用する際は、そのユニット内のすべての兵が危機ロールを行うのか？
question.ko: 규칙상 유닛이 위험 굴림을 수행해야 한다면, 유닛에 속한 모든 모델이 위험 굴림을 수행하나요?
question.zh: 如果一个规则要求己方单位必须进行一次危险掷骰，那这是否意味着单位中的每个模型都要进行一次危险掷骰？

answer.en: No, the unit would make 1 single hazard roll.
answer.de: Nein, jene Einheit führt einen einzelnen Risikowurf aus.
answer.es: No, la unidad hará 1 única tirada de riesgo.
answer.fr: Non, l'unité doit faire un unique jet de risque.
answer.it: No, si effettua un tiro pericolo per tutta l’unità.
answer.ja: そうではない。そのユニットは1回の危機ロールを行う。
answer.ko: 아니오, 그 유닛은 위험 굴림을 한 번만 수행합니다.
answer.zh: 不，那个单位进行一次危险掷骰。

question.en: In what step during the attack sequence do I roll for Feel No Pain?
question.de: In welchem Schritt während der Attackenabfolge würfle ich für Verletzungen ignorieren?
question.es: ¿En qué paso de la secuencia de ataque tiro para No hay dolor?
question.fr: À quelle étape de la séquence d'attaque dois-je faire les jets d'Insensible à la Douleur?
question.it: In quale passo durante la sequenza d'attacco effettuo i tiri per Insensibile al Dolore?
question.ja: 『痛みを知らぬ者』のダイスロールは、攻撃手順のどのステップ中に行うのか？
question.ko: 공격 절차 중 어느 단계에 불굴 굴림을 굴리나요?
question.zh: 我在攻击流程的哪一个步骤中进行不觉疼痛掷骰？

answer.en: In the Resolve Damage step of the Inflict Damage step (05.04).
answer.de: Im Schritt „Schaden abhandeln“ des Schritts „Schaden zufügen“ (05.04).
answer.es: En el paso Resolver daño del paso Infligir daño (05.04).
answer.fr: À l'étape Résoudre les Dégâts de l'étape Infliger des Dégâts (05.04).
answer.it: Nel passo Risolvere i Danni del passo Infliggere i Danni (05.04).
answer.ja: 「ダメージの処理」ステップの「ダメージの解決」ステップ中に行う（05.04）。
answer.ko: 피해 가하기 단계(05.04)의 피해 처리 단계에 굴립니다.
answer.zh: 在结算伤害步骤中的造成伤害步骤（05.04）。

question.en: Do models destroyed when a unit is out of coherency count for mission objectives?
question.de: Zählen Modelle, die zerstört wurden, weil ihre Einheit nicht in Formation war, für Missionsziele?
question.es: ¿Las miniaturas eliminadas cuando una unidad no está en coherencia cuentan para los objetivos de misión?
question.fr: Les figurines détruites quand une unité n'est plus en cohésion comptent-elles pour les objectifs de mission?
question.it: I modelli distrutti quando un’unità si trova fuori coesione contano ai fini degli obiettivi della missione?
question.ja: ユニットの隊形を維持できなかったことによって撃破された兵は、ミッション目標の撃破兵数に数えられる？
question.ko: 유닛이 결속 상태을 유지하지 못해 파괴된 모델도 임무 목표에 가산되나요?
question.zh: 因为脱离连续性而被摧毁的模型是否会被算入任务目标中？

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: その通りだ。
answer.zh: 算入。

question.en: If a rule allows my unit to pile-in or consolidate an extra distance in the Fight phase, when can I use that rule?
question.de: Wenn eine Regel meiner Einheit erlaubt, in der Nahkampfphase eine zusätzliche Entfernung bei einer Nachrücken- oder Neuordnenbewegung auszuführen, wann kann ich diese Regel verwenden?
question.es: Si una regla permite a mi unidad agruparse o consolidar a mayor distancia en la fase de combate, ¿cuándo puedo usar esa regla?
question.fr: Si une règle permet à mon unité de s'insérer ou de consolider d'une distance bonus à la phase de Combat, quand puis-je utiliser cette règle?
question.it: Se una regola consente a una mia unità di ammassarsi o consolidare di una distanza extra nella fase di Combattimento, quando posso usare quella regola?
question.ja: 白兵フェイズ中に、自軍ユニットが追加の距離だけ接敵移動や再編移動を行えるというルールがあるとする。そのルールはどのタイミングで使用できるのか？
question.ko: 밀착이나 규합 이동을 수행할 때 거리를 더 이동하게 해줄 수 있는 규칙은 언제 적용할 수 있나요?
question.zh: 如果一个规则允许己方单位在近战阶段中进行额外距离的跟进或重整移动，那么这些规则在什么时候进行使用？

answer.en: For pile-in moves, during the Pile-in step(12.02), and for consolidation moves, during the Consolidate step(12.07) of the Fight phase.
answer.de: Bei Nachrückenbewegungen tust du dies im Schritt Nachrücken (12.02), bei Neuordnenbewegungen im Schritt Neuordnen (12.07) der Nahkampfphase.
answer.es: Para movimientos de agruparse, durante el paso de Agruparse (12.02), y para movimientos de consolidar, durante el paso de Consolidar (12.07) de la fase de combate.
answer.fr: Pour les mouvements d'insertion, pendant l'étape d'Insertion (12.02), et pour les mouvements de consolidation, pendant l'étape de Consolidation (12.07) de la phase de Combat.
answer.it: Per i movimenti di ammassamento, durante il passo Ammassarsi (12.02); per i movimenti di consolidamento, durante il passo Consolidare (12.07) della fase di Combattimento.
answer.ja: 白兵フェイズ中の、接敵移動は「接敵移動ステップ（12.02）」に、再編移動は「再編移動ステップ（12.07）中に使用できる。
answer.ko: 백병전 페이즈 중, 밀착 이동은 밀착 단계(12.02)에, 규합 이동은 규합 단계(12.07) 도중 사용할 수 있습니다.
answer.zh: 跟进移动在近战阶段的跟进步骤（12.02）中进行，重整移动在近战阶段的重整步骤中（12.07）进行。

question.en: Can an Epic Hero unit form an attached unit with a unit that has an enhancement?
question.de: Kann eine <k>Epischer-Held</k>-Einheit eine angeschlossene Einheit mit einer Einheit bilden, die eine <b>Verbesserung</k> hat?
question.es: ¿Puede una unidad Héroe Épico formar una unidad adjunta con una unidad que tiene una mejora?
question.fr: Une unité de Héros Épique peut-elle former une unité attachée avec une unité qui a une optimisation?
question.it: Un'unità Eroe Epico può formare un'unità aggregata con un'unità che ha un potenziamento?
question.ja: 伝説的英雄・ユニットは、強化を持つユニットと合流ユニットを形成することができる？
question.ko: 서사적 영웅 유닛은 강화를 보유한 유닛과 합류 유닛을 형성할 수 있나요?
question.zh: 史诗英雄单位可以和一个拥有强化的单位组成联合单位吗？

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: できる。
answer.zh: 可以。

name.ja: アーミーロスターの作成

question.en: While making a move type other than a normal/advance move, can my MONSTER/VEHICLE unit move through friendly units?
question.de: Wenn meine MONSTER-/FAHRZEUG-Einheit irgendeinen Bewegungstyp außer einer normalen Bewegung/Vorrückenbewegung ausführt, kann sie sich durch befreundete Einheiten bewegen?
question.es: Al hacer un tipo de movimiento que no sea un movimiento normal/de avanzar, ¿puede mi unidad MONSTRUO/VEHÍCULO mover a través de unidades amigas?
question.fr: En faisant un type de mouvement autre qu'un mouvement normal/d'avance, mon unité de MONSTRE/VÉHICULE peut-elle se déplacer à travers les unités amies?
question.it: Quando una mia unità MOSTRO/VEICOLO effettua un tipo di movimento diverso da un movimento normale/di avanzata, può muoversi attraverso le unità amiche?
question.ja: 通常移動/全力移動以外の移動タイプを実行している間、自軍のモンスター/ビークル・ユニットは味方ユニットを通り抜けて移動できる？
question.ko: 일반/급속 이동이 아닌 이동 유형을 수행할 때, 아군 괴수/기체 유닛은 아군 유닛을 통과해 이동할 수 있나요?
question.zh: 在进行常规移动/突进移动以外的移动类型时，我的凶兽/载具单位可以穿过己方单位吗？

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: できる。
answer.zh: 可以。

name.ja: モンスターとビークルの移動

question.en: Can I select a unit to shoot or fight if it doesn't have melee or ranged weapons?
question.de: Kann ich eine Einheit zum Schießen oder zum Kämpfen wählen, wenn sie keine Nah- oder Fernkampfwaffen hat?
question.es: ¿Puedo elegir una unidad para que dispare o combata si no tiene armas a distancia o de combate?
question.fr: Puis-je choisir une unité pour tirer ou combattre si elle n'a pas d'armes de mêlée ou de tir?
question.it: Posso selezionare un’unità per tirare o combattere anche se non ha armi da tiro o da mischia?
question.ja: 白兵武器や射撃武器を持たないユニットでも、射撃や白兵を宣言することはできるのか？
question.ko: 백병전이나 원거리 무기가 없는 유닛도 지정해 사격이나 백병전을 수행하게 할 수 있나요?
question.zh: 如果一个单位没有装备近战或远程武器，我是否依旧可以选择它来进行近战或者射击？

answer.en: Yes, it just makes no attacks and then the fight type or shoot type is resolved.
answer.de: Ja, führe einfach keine Attacken aus; anschließend ist jenes Kämpfen oder Schießen abgehandelt.
answer.es: Sí; esta simplemente no hace ataques y luego se resuelve el tipo de disparo o tipo de combate.
answer.fr: Oui, elle n'effectuera simplement pas d'attaques, puis le type de combat ou le type de tir est résolu.
answer.it: Sì, l’unità non effettua attacchi e poi il tipo di combattimento o il tipo di tiro è risolto.
answer.ja: できる。その場合、攻撃を行わず、白兵タイプや射撃タイプを選んで解決する。
answer.ko: 예, 그럼 그 유닛은 그저 공격을 하지 않으며, 백병전 유형이나 사격 유형이 처리됩니다.
answer.zh: 可以，这样的单位在这么做时不会进行任何攻击，随后它所进行的近战类型或射击类型完成结算。

question.en: If I place units in strategic reserves during the battle, can this exceed the 50% of my points limit for the battle restriction as mentioned in Placing Units in Strategic Reserves (20.01)?
question.de: Wenn ich während der Schlacht Einheiten in die strategische Reserve versetze, kann dies die 50 % meiner Gesamtpunkte für die Schlacht gemäß den Regeln für das Versetzen von Einheiten in strategische Reserve (20.01) überschreiten?
question.es: Si coloco unidades en la reserva estratégica durante la batalla, ¿puedo superar el 50 % de mi límite de puntos para la restricción de batalla como se menciona en Colocar unidades en Reservas estratégicas (20.01)?
question.fr: Si je place des unités en réserve stratégique pendant la bataille, est-ce que je peux dépasser 50% de la limite de points conformément à la restriction de la bataille comme mentionné dans Placet des Unités en Réserve Stratégique (20.01)?
question.it: Se colloco un'unità nelle riserve strategiche durante la battaglia, ciò può portarmi a superare il 50% del limite in punti per la dimensione della battaglia imposto da Collocare Unità nelle Riserve Strategiche (20.01)?
question.ja: バトル中にユニットを戦略的予備戦力に配置する場合は、戦略的予備戦力へのユニットの配置（20.01）にて指示されている、そのバトル規模で使用可能なポイントコストの50％を超過してはいけないという制限を超過して配置できるのか？
question.ko: 전투 중 전략 예비대에 유닛을 넣는다면, 이 유닛들의 포인트 총합이 유닛을 전략 예비대에 넣기(20.01)에 명시된 포인트 제한(게임 규모의 50%)을 초과할 수 있나요?
question.zh: 如果我在战斗中将单位放入战略预备队，可否会超过将单位放入战略预备队（20.01）中提到 50% 分数上限?

answer.en: Yes. That restriction is applicable before the battle, in the Declare Battle Formations step.
answer.de: Ja. Jene Beschränkung findet nur vor der Schlacht im Schritt „Schlachtformation festlegen“ Anwendung.
answer.es: Sí. Esa restricción aplica antes de la batalla, en el paso Declarar formaciones de batalla.
answer.fr: Oui. Cette restriction est applicable avant la bataille, à l'étape Déclarer les Formations de Combat.
answer.it: Sì. Quella limitazione si applica solo prima della battaglia, nel passo Dichiarare le formazioni di battaglia.
answer.ja: その通りだ。その制限はバトル開始前の、戦闘陣形の宣言ステップ中に適用されるものだ。
answer.ko: 예. 해당 포인트 제한은 전투 전, 전투 진형 선언 단계에서 적용되는 내용입니다.
answer.zh: 可以。该上限仅适用于战斗开始前的宣布战斗阵型步骤。

name.fr: Placer des Unités en Réserve Stratégique
name.ja: 戦略的予備戦力へのユニットの配置
name.zh: 将单位放入战略预备队

question.en: When checking coherency for my unit can my unit be in multiple groups?
question.de: Wenn ich prüfe, ob eine Einheit in Formation ist, kann sie sich in mehreren Gruppen befinden?
question.es: Al comprobar la coherencia de mi unidad, ¿puede estar mi unidad en varios grupos?
question.fr: Quand je vérifier la cohésion de mon unité, mon unité peut-elle être en plusieurs groupes?
question.it: Quando verifico la coesione della mia unità, la mia unità può trovarsi in più gruppi?
question.ja: 隊形の維持をチェックする際、そのユニットは複数のグループに分かれていても良いのか？
question.ko: 유닛의 결속 상태를 체크할 때, 유닛이 다수의 그룹에 속할 수 있나요?
question.zh: 在确认连续性时，一个单位是否可以被分成多个小组？

answer.en: No, it must be in a single contiguous group as per Units and Models (01.02) and What is Coherency in the core rules.
answer.de: Nein, die Einheit muss eine einzelne durchgängige Gruppe gemäß Einheiten und Modelle (01.02) und Was ist Formation? (03.03) in den Grundregeln bilden.
answer.es: No, debe ser un único grupo ininterrumpido como se indica en Unidades y miniaturas (01.02) y ¿Qué es la coherencia? (03.03).
answer.fr: Non, il doit s'agir d'un seul groupe contigu, comme décrit dans Unités et Figurines (01.02) et Qu'est-ce que la Cohésion? (03.03).
answer.it: No, deve essere in un singolo gruppo contiguo come indicato in Unità e Modelli (01.02) e in Cos’è la Coesione? nelle regole base (03.03).
answer.ja: そうではない。ユニットと兵（01.02）および隊形とは何か？（03.03）の記述に従い、ユニットは単一のグループで隊形を維持している必要がある。
answer.ko: 아니오, 기본 규칙의 유닛과 모델(01.02), 그리고 결속 상태란? 섹션(03.03)에 따라 유닛은 단일 그룹에 속해야 합니다.
answer.zh: 不能，一个单位必须是单个团结的群体，具体请查看核心规则中的单位和模型（01.02）和什么是连续性？（03.03）。

question.en: If my unit has taken control of an objective at the end of my movement phase and that unit has as an ability that secures an objective they control, can they secure that objective?
question.de: Wenn meine Einheit am Ende meiner Bewegungsphase die Kontrolle über ein Missionsziel erlangt und jene Einheit hat eine Regel, die ein von ihr kontrolliertes Missionsziel sichert, kann sie jenes Missionsziel sichern?
question.es: Si mi unidad toma el control de un objetivo al final de mi fase de movimiento y esa unidad tiene una habilidad que asegura un objetivo que controle, ¿puede asegurar ese objetivo?
question.fr: Si mon unité a pris le contrôle d'un objectif à la fin de ma phase de Mouvement, et si cette unité a une aptitude qui sécurise un objectif qu'elle contrôle, peut-elle sécuriser cet objectif?
question.it: Se la mia unità ha preso il controllo di un obiettivo alla fine della mia fase di Movimento e quell’unità ha un’abilità che mette in sicurezza un obiettivo che controlla, può mettere in sicurezza quell’obiettivo?
question.ja: 自軍の移動フェイズ終了時に、自軍のユニットが作戦目標を確保しており、そのユニットは確保した作戦目標を安定化するアビリティを持っていたとする。そのユニットは、その作戦目標を安定化できるのか？
question.ko: 아군 유닛이 제 이동 페이즈 종료 시 목표물을 장악했고, 장악한 목표물을 확보하는 능력을 가지고 있을 때, 그 목표물을 확보할 수 있나요?
question.zh: 如果一个单位在己方移动阶段结束时控制了一个目标，并且那个单位拥有占领控制目标的技能，那么是否可以占领那个目标？

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: その通りだ。
answer.zh: 可以

question.en: If my unit has the Deadly Demise ability and has an ability that allows it to Fight on Death, how do I resolve this?
question.de: Wenn meine Einheit Gefährliches Ende hat und eine Fähigkeit, die ihr bei Zerstörung zu kämpfen erlaubt, wie handle ich dies ab?
question.es: Si mi unidad tiene la habilidad Final violento y tiene una habilidad que le permite combatir al morir, ¿cómo lo resuelvo?
question.fr: Si mon unité a l'aptitude Destruction Néfaste ainsi qu'une aptitude qui lui permet de combattre après sa destruction, comment résolvé-je cela?
question.it: Se la mia unità ha l’abilità Dipartita Micidiale e ha un’abilità che le consente di Combattere nel Momento della Morte, come risolvo la situazione?
question.ja: 自軍のユニットが『恐るべき最期』アビリティと、死に際の白兵戦が可能になるアビリティを持っていたとする。この場合、どのようにアビリティを解決するのか？
question.ko: 제 유닛이 치명적 최후와 임사 전투 능력을 동시에 보유하고 있다면, 어떻게 처리해야 하나요?
question.zh: 如果一个单位拥有致命破灭技能以及一个让它能够死亡近战的技能，那么如何进行结算？

answer.en: Fight on Death rules are resolved before Deadly Demise abilities, meaning that your unit's Deadly Demise will resolve after your unit has fought/at the end of the phase and the relevant models have been removed from the battlefield.
answer.de: Regeln, die bei Zerstörung zu kämpfen erlauben, werden vor Gefährliches-Ende abgehandelt, was bedeutet, dass Gefährliches Ende abgehandelt wird, nachdem deine Einheit am Ende der Phase gekämpft hat und die entsprechenden Modelle vom Schlachtfeld entfernt werden.
answer.es: Las reglas de combatir al morir se resuelven antes que las habilidades Final violento, lo que significa que Final violento se resolverá después de que tu unidad haya combatido al final de la fase y las miniaturas relevantes hayan sido retiradas del campo de batalla.
answer.fr: Les règles Combattre après sa Destruction sont résolues avant les aptitudes de Destruction Néfaste, ce qui signifie que vous résoudrez la Destruction Néfaste de votre unité après qu'elle a combattu à la fin de la phase, et après que les figurines concernées ont été retirées du champ de bataille.
answer.it: Le regole Combattere nel Momento della Morte si risolvono prima delle abilità Dipartita Micidiale, dunque la Dipartita Micidiale della tua unità si risolve dopo che la tua unità ha combattuto alla fine della fase e che i relativi modelli sono stati rimossi dal campo.
answer.ja: 死に際の白兵戦のルールは、『恐るべき最期』アビリティの前に解決される。これにより、その自軍ユニットは、そのユニットがそのフェイズ終了時に白兵を行った後か、あるいは対応する兵が戦場から取り除かれるタイミングで『恐るべき最期』を解決する。
answer.ko: 임사 전투 규칙을 치명적 최후 능력보다 먼저 처리합니다. 즉, 플레이어 유닛의 치명적 최후 능력은 그 유닛이 백병전을 페이즈 종료 시에 수행한 뒤 해당 모델이 전장에서 제거된 후 처리한다는 뜻입니다.
answer.zh: 死亡近战 规则会在致命破灭技能之前进行结算，意味着您的单位的致命破灭会在它于阶段结束时进行近战后，并在相关的模型被移出战场后进行结算。

question.en: If I have a rule that says my unit can move up to 6" when it makes a pile-in move or consolidation move, does this also mean it changes the maximum distance of those moves to 6"?
question.de: Wenn ich eine Regel habe, die besagt, dass meine Einheit sich bei einer Nachrückenbewegung oder Neuordnenbewegung bis zu 6" weit bewegen kann, bedeutet dies, dass auch die maximale Entfernung jener Bewegungen auf 6" angehoben wird?
question.es: Si tengo una regla que dice que mi unidad puede mover hasta 6" cuando hace un movimiento de agruparse o de consolidar, ¿eso significa también que la distancia máxima de esos movimientos pasa a ser 6"?
question.fr: Si j'ai une règle qui stipule que mon unité peut se déplacer de 6" maximum quand elle fait un mouvement d'insertion ou un mouvement de consolidation, cela signifie-t-il qu'elle remplace aussi la distance maximum de ces mouvements par 6"?
question.it: Se ho una regola che dice che una mia unità può muoversi di massimo 6" quando effettua un movimento di ammassamento o un movimento di consolidamento, ciò significa anche che cambia la distanza massima di tali movimenti in 6"?
question.ja: 「ユニットが接敵移動や再編移動を行う際、自軍のユニットは最大6mvまで移動できる」というルールがあるとする。この場合、それらの移動の最大距離も6mvに変更されるのか？
question.ko: 규칙에 아군 유닛이 밀착 이동이나 규합 이동 수행 시 6"까지 이동할 수 있다고 명시되어 있다면, 그 이동 유형의 최대 이동 거리를 6"로 변경한다는 뜻인가요?
question.zh: 如果一个规则表示我的单位在进行跟进移动或重整移动时可以移动最多 6"，这是否也意味着这些移动的最大距离被改为 6"？

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: その通りだ。
answer.zh: 是的。

question.en: Does the limit to the combined points value of my units in strategic reserves only apply until the start of the first battle round?
question.de: Gilt die Begrenzung für den Gesamtpunktwert meiner Einheiten in strategischer Reserve nur bis zum Beginn der ersten Schlachtrunde?
question.es: ¿El límite al valor en puntos combinado de mis unidades en reservas estratégicas solo aplica hasta el inicio de la primera ronda de batalla?
question.fr: Est-ce que la limite de valeurs en points combinées de mes unités en réserve stratégique s'applique seulement jusqu'au début du premier round de bataille?
question.it: Il limite al valore in punti combinato delle mie unità nelle riserve strategiche si applica solo fino all'inizio del primo round di battaglia?
question.ja: 戦略的予備戦力に配置可能な自軍ユニットの合計ポイントコスト上限値は、第一バトルラウンド開始時以前にのみ適用されるのか？
question.ko: 전략 예비대 유닛의 포인트 수치 총합에 적용되는 제한은, 첫 번째 전투 라운드가 시작되기 전까지만 적용되나요?
question.zh: 我的战略预备队中的单位总分数限制是否只持续至第一个战斗轮次开始?

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: その通りだ。
answer.zh: 是。

name.fr: Placer des Unités en Réserve Stratégique
name.ja: 戦略的予備戦力へのユニットの配置
name.zh: 将单位放入战略预备队

question.en: If a unit makes any disembark move in a turn (i.e. Disembark move, Emergency Disembark move etc.) has it disembarked that turn?
question.de: Wenn sich meine Einheit an Bord eines Transporters befindet und irgendeine Art von Bewegung ausführt, die sie aus jenem Transporter aussteigen lässt (z. B. eine Ausstiegsbewegung, Notausstiegsbewegung, Kampfausstiegsbewegung usw.), ist meine Einheit dann in jenem Zug ausgestiegen?
question.es: Si mi unidad embarcada en un Transporte hace algún movimiento que implique que desembarque de dicho Transporte (por ejemplo: movimiento de desembarcar, movimiento de desembarco de emergencia, movimiento de desembarco de combate, etc.), ¿se considera que mi unidad ha desembarcado en ese turno?
question.fr: Si mon unité qui est embarquée dans un Transport fait le moindre mouvement qui implique de débarquer du Transport (ex. mouvement de débarquement, débarquement d'urgence, mouvement de débarquement de combat, etc.), mon unité compte-t-elle comme ayant débarqué à ce tour?
question.it: Se una mia unità imbarcata in un Trasporto effettua qualsiasi tipo di movimento che la porta a sbarcare da quel Trasporto (ad esempio movimento di sbarco, movimento di sbarco d'emergenza, movimento di sbarco in combattimento, ecc.), la mia unità è sbarcata in quel turno?
question.ja: 兵員輸送に乗車中の自軍のユニットが、その兵員輸送から降車する何らかの移動を行った場合（例：降車移動や緊急降車移動、戦闘降車移動など）、そのユニットはそのターンに「降車を行った」ものとして扱われるのか？
question.ko: 수송 모델에 탑승한 제 유닛이 그 수송 모델로부터 하차하게 하는 이동을 수행한다면(예: 하차 이동, 비상 하차 이동, 전투 하차 이동 등), 그 유닛이 그 턴에 하차한 것인가요?
question.zh: 如果我的单位搭乘在运输工具中，并且进行了任何会导致它从那个运输工具中脱离的移动（例如，脱离移动、紧急脱离移动、战斗脱离移动等），那么这个单位是否在那个回合中进行了脱离？

answer.it: Sì.
answer.ja: その通りだ。
answer.zh: 是的。

question.en: When a move says that a model or unit must move in a way if it is able, can that requirement force the unit to end their move not in coherency?
question.de: Wenn ein Bewegungstyp angibt, dass ein Modell oder eine Einheit sich auf eine bestimmte Art bewegen muss, „wenn möglich“, können solche Bedingungen eine Einheit zwingen, jene Bewegung nicht in Formation zu beenden?
question.es: Cuando un tipo de movimiento indica que una miniatura o unidad debe mover de cierta manera, "si es posible", ¿pueden tales requisitos obligar a una unidad a terminar ese movimiento sin coherencia?
